understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete puzzle levels by maneuvering selectable pieces (P/S) onto goal positions (+) within a limited number of steps, progressing through multiple levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece by 3 pixels in that direction unless blocked by walls (#) or other objects; pushable blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates. Heuristics like movement.blocked provide hints but actions must be tested to confirm behavior, and some boundaries interact uniquely.
